tasks.title: Adopt task-specific worktree defaults for non-trivial work
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md requires checking branch, remote state, and worktree list before substantive edits.
AGENTS.md routes non-trivial coding, documentation, AI-team, and website work into a task-specific worktree by default.
The policy preserves dirty or ambiguous existing worktrees instead of stashing, switching, or cleaning them.
done_definition: Worktree policy is present in the root operating manual.

tasks.title: Define ai-team-supervisor as the active routing skill
acceptance_criteria: skills/ai-team-supervisor is an operational supervisor skill, not an installer or template package.
AGENTS.md and agents/supervisor.md say the Supervisor skill owns routing judgment.
scripts/ai-team/supervisor.mjs route is documented and implemented as advisory only.
done_definition: The supervisor skill describes routing rules, agent dispatch, state writes, and script boundaries.

tasks.title: Define the web design/build skill stack
acceptance_criteria: Website/UI tasks route through ai-team-supervisor and the repo design-rule-engine before implementation.
Design and build agents explicitly reference Vercel skills for shadcn, Geist, v0, Next.js, React quality, and browser verification.

Design guidance references Anthropic's public frontend-design, theme-factory, brand-guidelines, canvas-design, web-artifacts-builder, and webapp-testing skills as inspiration or source material, without treating unavailable skills as installed local tools.
done_definition: Agent prompts and repo-local skill docs contain the routing contract.

tasks.title: Remove cross-repo installer/template package assets
acceptance_criteria: skills/ai-team-supervisor contains only operational skill files, not installer scripts or copied template assets.
Standalone documentation for publishing or installing ai-team-supervisor is removed.
The actual supervisor helper scripts under scripts/ai-team remain available for init, work-package printing, refinement, validation, and advisory route suggestions.
done_definition: Repository search finds no template installer assets or installer docs.

assumptions: This task changes AI-team operating files only and does not modify product UI or runtime behavior.
Anthropic public design skills are not installed in this Codex session; references must be phrased as external design-skill inspiration unless installed later.
The cross-repo installer package is not needed, but an operational Supervisor skill is needed.
risks: Changing ai:route to advisory may require future callers to update run.json through the Supervisor skill instead of relying on the script.
Over-prescribing skill usage could slow trivial read-only tasks, so worktree and skill routing should explicitly exempt trivial direct answers.
